data.content:
The formula in the image can be written in LaTeX as follows:

```latex
o^t = U r^t + W s^{t-1}, \quad s^t = \tanh(o^t)
```

This will render the equation as shown in the image.

data.content:
```latex
E(v_p, v_g) = 
\begin{cases} 
\|v_p - v_g\|^2 & p = g \\
\max \left(0, m - \|v_p - v_g\|^2\right) & p \neq g
\end{cases}
```
data.latex:
```latex
E(v_p, v_g) = 
\begin{cases}

\max \left(0, m - \|v_p - v_g\|^2\right) & p \neq g
\end{cases}
```
